name: Command
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Command helpers with local query state, filtering, keyboard highlight movement, selection, dialog composition, shortcuts, empty state, and deterministic examples.

registry.reason: Closed dialog examples compose the local shadcn Button trigger.
CommandDialog composes the local shadcn Dialog item for modal command palettes.
CommandInput composes the local shadcn Input Group helper for the search affordance.
shadcn Command uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, message, Story, and Foldkit-native view/update APIs.
Provides Effect Schema metadata, Option, Match, Array, and String helpers.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin command behavior is represented by local Foldkit state helpers instead of the cmdk runtime.
Origin icons are represented by local inline SVG helpers in installable source.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local deterministic Arabic example data.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: CommandDemo
examples.description: Static Command menu with suggestions, disabled item, settings group, shortcuts, and local inline icons.
examples.distinguishes: Static Command menu with suggestions, disabled item, settings group, shortcuts, and local inline icons.

examples.title: CommandBasic
examples.description: Closed CommandDialog trigger matching the origin default visible surface.
examples.distinguishes: Closed CommandDialog trigger matching the origin default visible surface.

examples.title: CommandDialogDemo
examples.description: Keyboard shortcut hint for opening a closed CommandDialog.
examples.distinguishes: Keyboard shortcut hint for opening a closed CommandDialog.

examples.title: CommandManyItems
examples.description: Closed scrollable CommandDialog trigger for a many-item command palette.
examples.distinguishes: Closed scrollable CommandDialog trigger for a many-item command palette.

examples.title: CommandRtl
examples.description: RTL Command menu using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector runtime.
examples.distinguishes: RTL Command menu using local Arabic strings instead of the origin language selector runtime.

deviations.summary: Command query, filtering, highlight, selection, and dialog state use Foldkit messages/update helpers instead of cmdk and React state.
deviations.rationale: Installable source must stay Foldkit-native and cannot depend on the cmdk React runtime.

deviations.summary: Command examples use local inline SVG helpers instead of lucide-react imports.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve icon footprint and class-token affordances.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local constants preserve the default RTL rendered output.

deviations.summary: Closed dialog examples render the same visible trigger or keyboard-hint surface as origin while keeping CommandDialog available for open local state.
deviations.rationale: Origin examples initialize CommandDialog as closed. The Foldkit examples preserve that visible default and test open behavior through the component API.

distinguishes: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Command helpers with local query state, filtering, keyboard highlight movement, selection, dialog composition, shortcuts, empty state, and deterministic examples.
